## Summary

Describe the theorem cluster, scaffold, or repository change in one short
paragraph.

## Paths touched

- Note path:
- Lean path:
- Related issue:

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one track or one repository-plumbing improvement.
- [ ] Notes and Lean scaffolds still point at the same target.
- [ ] `UlamLib` is the namespace root for new Lean files.
- [ ] README or TRACKS was updated if paths or priorities changed.
- [ ] The changed note still has explicit assumptions and a formalization order.
